SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AboutConnection
A subclass of URLConnection that handles URLs of the form "about:/xxx".
AboutURLStreamHandler
A URLStreamHandler that instantiates AboutConnection instances.
AppearanceSettingsPane
Implements the "Appearance" tab of the SettingsDialog.
ApplicationDownloadTarget
A DownloadTarget for use with SwingFileDownload (and possibly others in due course), that sends data to an external media player.
AtomConverter
Converts and Atom XML feed to HTML, suitable for display in the document viewer window.
AttachIdentityDialog
The "Attach identity" dialog, that manages assigning a named identity to an existing Java keystore.
BookmarkHandler
The interface that defines a bookmark handler.
Captions
 
CaztorDialog
A base class for all the dialogs Caztor uses.
CaztorException
This exception was supposed to have been the base for many different application exceptions.
CaztorURLStreamHandlerFactory
A factory for creating our customer URLStreamHandler instances, according to the URL protocol.
CertUtil
Various utilities for managing keystores and passwords.
ClientCertHandler
The interface governing UI elements that manage identity.
ClientCertManager
The interface that governs client certificate management.
Clipboard
A simple helper class for clipboad operations.
CompletionHandler
An interface that is passed to various methods that run asynchronously, and then do something when they have completed.
Config
Retrieves and manages application configuration.
ConfigChangeListener
This interface is implemented by any class that can respond to configuration changes.
Constants
This file contains definitions of all the constants that are referenced in more than one place.
ContentFetcher
A helper class for downloading content in background threads.
ContentHandlerAction
This interface is just a place to group constants that define how Caztor should behave when the user tries to download something that the application does not natively support.
Converter
This interface is implemented by all something-to-HTML converters
DefaultBookmarkHandler
The main bookmark handler.
DefaultClientCertHandler
Implements the main user interface to the user identity manager, for a specific remote URL.
DefaultClientCertManager
Methods for handling client certificates that are associated with Identity.
DefaultDownloadMonitor
This is the default implementation of DownloadMonitor for the Swing UI.
DefaultFeedHandler
The main feed handler.
DialogHelper
A helper class for raising error and information dialogs, to reduce the duplication of code each of the many times this happens in the rest of the application.
Dialogs
 
Download
This interface represents a single instance of an ongoing or complete download.
DownloadMonitor
This interface governs the behavior of download monitors.
DownloadMonitorListener
This interface controls the behaviour of a DownloadMonitorListener.
DownloadsDialog
DownloadsDialog shows the contents of the DownloadsMonitor as a JFrame.
DownloadTarget
A DownloadTarget controls where a Download sends its data to.
EditFileDialog
A simple file editor, which Caztor uses to edit the bookmarks file, settings file, and perhaps others in future.
ErrorResponseException
An Exception that represents an error response received from a remote server, after establishing a connection successfully.
FeedException
An exception thrown to indicate a problem with feed parsing.
FeedHandler
The interface that defines a feed handler.
FeedManagerDialog
FeedManagerDialog provides the interface to the FeedManager, and shows the progress of feed aggregation.
FeedManagerStatusListener
This interface is implemented by anything that wants to be updated about the status of the feed aggregation process.
FeedPost
FeedPost represents a post from a feed.
FeedSettingsPane
Implements the Feed tab of the Settings dialog.
FileDownloadTarget
A DownloadTarget that represents a local file.
FileUtil
A collection of utility methods for parsing filenames and guessing file contents.
FilteredComboBox
This is my attempt at implementing a filtered combo box, that is, one where the list changes so that it only shows entries that match what the user is typing.
GemConverter
A class for converting GemText to HTML.
GeminiConnection
A subclass of URLConnection that handles the Gemini protocol.
GeminiURLStreamHandler
A URLStreamHandler that instantiates GeminiConnection.
GemLink
A carrier class for parsing and storing Gemini links.
GemUtil
Various utilities for interpreting the contents of Gemtext files.
General
 
GopherConnection
A subclass of URLConnection that handles the Gopher protocol.
GophermapConverter
A class for converting a gophermap to HTML.
GopherURLStreamHandler
A URLStreamHandler that instantiates GopherConnection.
HandleDifferentlyException
Protocol handlers throw this exception to indicate that the caller should do something differently than just slurp the remote document into memory.
HistorySettingsPane
Implements the History tab of the Settings dialog.
HomeSettingsPane
Implements the Home tab of the Settings dialog.
IdentException
This exception is thrown from methods in the IdentUtil class, to indicate that an identity name selected by the user is invalid in some way.
IdentityDialog
Implements the Identity tag of the Settings dialog.
IdentUtil
A few helper methods for managing user identity names, and mapping them to filenames.
ImagesSettingsPane
Implements the Images tab of the Settings dialog.
KeystoreSpec
A simple carrier class for a keystore specification.
Logger
Centralize logging in this one class, so we can control it with configuration.
Main
Main contains methods for management of the application as a whole.
MainWindow
MainWindow is where most of the work of the Swing UI happens.
MarkdownConverter
A class for converting Markdown to HTML.
MediaSettingsPane
Implements the Media tab of the Settings dialog.
Menus
 
Messages
 
NewIdentityDialog
Implements the "New identity" dialog.
NexConnection
A subclass of URLConnection that handles the nex: protocol.
NexConverter
A class for converting nex-flavoured plain text to HTML.
NexURLStreamHandler
A URLStreamHandler that instantiates NexConnection.
RedirectedException
A URLConnection subclass throws this exception when it gets a response indicating a redirection.
ResponseContent
Holds all the information that came from an asynchronous file transfer.
RetryWithInputException
This Exception is thrown by the Gemini and Spartan connection classes, when the server sends a response that indicates it wants some additional data -- which usually means prompting the user for input.
SearchSettingsPane
Implement the Search tab of the Settings dialog.
SelectActionDialog
Implements the Select action dialog, which is raised when the user follows a link to a type of content we don't handle.
SettingsDialog
Implements the Settings dialog.
SettingsPane
The base class for all the individual tabs of the Settings dialog.
SpartanConnection
A subclass of URLConnection that handles the Spartan protocol.
SpartanURLStreamHandler
A URLStreamHandler that instantiates SpartanConnection.
StatusBar
Implements the status bar at the bottom of each window, along with the logic to clear messages from it periodically.
StatusHandler
A singleton class that handles status messages for the whole application.
StatusListener
An interface that is implemented by anything that can add itself to the status monitoring framework implemented by StatusHandler.
StreamEater
A class that reads a stream and throws the data away.
SwingDownload
This class represents a single instance of an ongoing or complete download.
SwingFileDownload
This class represents a single instance of an ongoing or complete download.
SwingUI
Start the Swing UI.
TextConverter
A class for converting plain text to HTML.
TextEntryDialog
A text entry dialog specifically for entering text that will be encoded into the 'query' part of a URL.
TextLikeConverter
Base class for converters that basically handle text, but have a specific "=>" syntax for links.
ThemeSettingsPane
Implements the Theme tab of the Settings dialog.
Tooltips
 
TopBar
The top bar contains the navigation buttons and URL combo box.
UI
The base class for user interfaces.
UnsupportedContentException
Thrown by the ContentFetcher class to indicate that it received a kind of document it can't process.
